commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates gateway boot startup handling to use an `agent:<id>:boot` session, suppress prompt persistence, restore that boot mapping after the run, and adds focused gateway boot regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main passes the generated `BOOT.md` prompt to `agentCommand` under the canonical main session key, and the linked issue provides installed-gateway restart evidence of repeated persisted boot prompts. I did not execute the gateway scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; this automerge-opted PR has no blocking review finding and should proceed through required checks and mergeability gates.
